description_long: This is a life-sized adult human figure with a realistic body shape and proportions, standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides. The figure features a detailed head with medium-length, layered hair that frames the face and extends to the neck. The facial features are well-defined, including eyes, nose, and mouth, giving the figure a lifelike appearance. The body is unclothed, revealing anatomical details such as muscle definition, joints, and fingers. The feet are flat on the ground, and the hands are open with fingers slightly curved. The overall surface is smooth and matte, with subtle shading to accentuate the contours of the body.
description: A realistic adult human figure with detailed facial features, medium-length layered hair, and a smooth, anatomically accurate body standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full frontal body details with arms at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the head's shape, nose, and the body's side contours.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, back, and legs.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the side of the face, torso, and leg alignment.
